facebook.content:
"Dear Family, 

I want to personally invite you to join us in worship. Our monthly in-person gatherings are on the first Saturday of every month at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph in Southfield, MI. If you can't join us in person, you're welcome to join us daily online for 'Hour of Power' on Facebook Live, Monday through Friday at 8:15 AM. Let's come together in spirit and in truth. I look forward to worshiping with you soon."
